settings.birthday_email_body:
In the words of Burton Hills,

"Happiness is not a destination, It is a method of life."

May you find much to fill your life with happiness on this special day and throughout the coming year.

 

As your insurance agent, I don't always have the opportunity to connect with you as often as I'd like.

But on this special day, know I am thinking of you. Wishing you a day filled with joy and a year that is all you could hope for.

Happy Birthday!
settings.quotesheet_body:
Hi [firstname]!

As promised, here are a few plans that I have put together for you based on our previous discussion.  After researching the different Insurance Companies in your area these are the options that best fit what you were looking for.   Please look them over along with the attached brochures and let me know what questions you have.  I look forward to our phone appointment (ENTER DATE/TIME).   Please try to have the plans in front of you when I call so that we can review them together!

Click this link for your Quote: [quotesheet]


Wishing you good health,
settings.appointment_subject: Your Appointment Reminder to discuss your Health Insurance options!
settings.appointment_body:
Hi [firstname],

On [apptdate] at [appttimelocal], we have a phone appointment to discuss your health insurance options for the up-coming year. If this time does not work please give me a call or drop me a note as soon as possible to reschedule.


PLEASE CLICK THE FOLLOWING LINK TO CONFIRM YOUR APPOINTMENT: 
[confirmlink] 

With the all the changes in health care reform times are very limited.


Keep in mind, there may be some system issues.  If I start to run behind we will be in contact with you to give you a new estimated time or reschedule if the new time does not work.  


Thank you for your cooperation…

data.name: Aged Lead - Call 1 - VM/EM/TX
data.subject: Are You Finding Health Insurance Options Are Getting Very Complicated?
data.body:
[firstname]

Health insurance gets more complicated every day, so we can all use a helping hand to sort out what the best options really are. If you would like, I would be happy to go over the coverage options available to you. I believe that my experience and knowledge will give you a better understanding of what you are choosing and the benefits the plan provides.

For additional assistance in reviewing your options or simply to understand your present coverage better, email me with a convenient time to talk on the phone. Or just give me a call at [agentphone].

To your health,

data.name: Aged Lead - Call 3 - EM
data.subject: Are You Finding Rates Affordable?   We Have An Option.
data.body:
[firstname] [lastname],

We have not yet connected but there is a reason for us to connect now.

Did you know that for as little as $39.95 per month (only $5 more for your whole family), you can get:

* $5000 of Accident Medical Expense coverage
* Rx Precription Savings up to 65%
* Lab Test Savings of 10% - 50%
* Diabetic Supply Savings of 15% - 50%
* Dental Savings of 15% - 40%
* X-rays & Imaging Savings of 10% - 50%
* Vision & LASIK Savings of 10% - 50%
* Hearing Savings up to 15%
* 24 Hour M.D. Hotline for presciptions & non-emergency consultations

* GUARANTEED APPROVAL!


If I do not hear back from you, I will try to connect with you again around [nextactionstamp].
Thanks,

data.name: Aged Lead - Call 7 - Final VM/EM/TX
data.subject: Final Attempt...Closing The Account.
data.body:
Final Attempt!


A bit ago you had inquired online about health insurance and I have been unable to reach you. Just checking to see if you are still interested.
Have you given up as you found that you are not eligible for a tax credit, which made the Affordable Care Act plans NOT so affordable!

 

Regardless of your budget or medical history I can help you!
I'd like to help you find affordable health insurance. If you would like to speak with me directly, please feel free to contact me at [agentphone].



Yours truly,

data.name: Birthday Email
data.subject: Happy Birthday!
data.body:
Hi [firstname]! 


Thinking of you on your special day :)


Wishing you a year full of happiness and health. 


Have a great day,

data.name: Business Owner - Email 11 - FINAL ATTEMPT
data.subject: Attn: FINAL ATTEMPT
data.body:
Hello [firstname],


Final Attempt...


In the last few days, we have reached out several times to help you with your health insurance needs, as a Self Employed individual.  As we mentioned, there is a new program for Business Owners and Self Employed individuals. 


I am sorry we have not been able to connect.  At this time, we will close down your account.

However, if your needs change, feel free to contact me at [agentphone].

 

Warm regards,

data.name: Facebook Lead Call #1 Email (MJ)
data.subject: Info requested Orlando 3 day/2 nights
data.body:
Hi [firstname] [lastname] 

You asked for more information about a trip that I offer on FB. I have a surprise for you!!! It is good for more locations than just Orlando!!! 


 3 Day / 2 Night Family Fun Vacation 

Enjoy a 3 day, 2 night Family Fun Vacation to over 500 US & Canada Destinations for 2 adults (21+) & up to 2 children under age 11. 

There is no purchase necessary!!!  

I know what your thinking...No!!!!  you don’t have to sit thru ANY sort of presentation either !!!! 

Your only cost will be any taxes or fees 

( average cost is about 20 dollars a night)  

All I ask is that you allow me to quote your Healthcare or Life Insurance or give me a referral to a family or friend that would like a quote. THAT’S ALL!!!!! 

 

Please call me at 239-471-2807 so I can send you the certificate

data.name: Facebook Lead Call #10 Email (MJ)
data.subject: Maybe right now is not the right time!
data.body:
Hi [firstname], 

This is [agentfirst] again. I've left several voicemails, texts as well as emails and since I don’t want to waste anymore of your time or my own, I’m just going to assume that this is just not the right time for you. I’ll check back in again at a later time, you know what happens when you assume. I will still offer you the same trips when you are ready It would mean the world to me if you could put my info into your phone just in case there is ever anything I can do for you. I will check back with periodically, But in the meantime, if there is anything that I can do to help you feel free to call me at [agentphone]  I hope you have a great day 

Respectfully,

data.name: Facebook Lead Call #4 Email (MJ)
data.subject: Info requested Orlando Trip
data.body:
Hi [firstname],   

I thought that offering the 3day/2 night trip was a great value but maybe I was wrong? So I thought I would up my game a little! How about if I offer you your choice of 3 different trips, each better then the one before. Of course my first one is still the family fun vacation: 

3 Day / 2 Night Family Fun Vacation 

Enjoy a 3 day, 2 night Family Fun Vacation to over 500 US & Canada Destinations for 2 adults (21+) & up to 2 children under age 11. 

But then I thought what if you don't have any kids or just need some adult time away! So how about:  

3 Nights - Las Vegas Getaway 

3 Nights on the strip in Las Vegas Hotel  

Or  

2 Night Sunscape All Inclusive 

 Valid for 2 adults ages 18 and older with a valid driver’s license and credit card. Good for 2 nights at an All Inclusive Sunscape resort in Mexico or Dominican Republic. Includes food, beverages and non motorized activities. Travel within 24 months. 

As you already know, there is no purchase necessary and you Don’t have to sit thru ANY presentations.  

I will give you one of these certificates for allowing me to quote your healthcare or life insurance! 

But I’m gonna up my game again!!! 

If you give me a referral to a family member or friend that is looking to save on their healthcare or Life Insurance. I will give you both a certificate for:  

4 Night - Resort Collection 

RETAIL VALUE: $800-$1,500 - Luxury Four Star Resort Stay for 2 adults and 2 children ages 11 and under. 9 Resorts in 5 Destinations: Acapulco, Mazatlán, Nuevo Vallarta/Puerto Vallarta, Puerto Penasco, and Riviera Maya/Cancun 

or 

7 Night - Resort Collection 

RETAIL VALUE: $1,400-$2,750 - Luxury Four Star Resort Stay for 2 adults and 2 children ages 11 and under. 12 Resorts in 6 Destinations: Acapulco, Ixtapa, Mazatlán, Nuevo Vallarta/Puerto Vallarta, Puerto Penasco, and Riviera Maya/Cancun. 

So how do you think I did this time? 

 

It will only take about 10 minutes of your time to receive the certificate! Call me at 239-471-2807 for your free quote!!

data.name: Flowers Sold Lead - Call #1 EMAIL
data.body:
Hi [firstname],

My name is [agentfirst] from Healthcare Solutions Team. In the past, you have worked with us on your health insurance. Due to recent changes, you may be entitled to lower payments.

We can see if you qualify in just a few minutes. I left you a voicemail and will call again later today.

data.name: Flowers Sold Lead - Call #3 EMAIL
data.body: [firstname], I just left a voicemail. Let’s schedule a time to talk for about 10-15 minutes and see what new options are available to you this year.

data.name: Flowers Sold Lead - Call #5 EMAIL
data.body: [firstname], I know we’ve been missing each other. I can get a few things started to help save on your premium. Let me know a good time to speak. Please have with you a few things: Current Carrier, Who is being covered, and any Pre Existing Conditions. Thanks!

data.name: Flowers Sold Lead - Call#10 EMAIL
data.body:
Hey [firstname], I’ve been trying to reach you. We’re going to go ahead and close out your file for now. Remember that those law changes have taken effect and you may qualify for complete coverage for less than $150 per person. Email me back if we need to reopen your file. Keep in mind that should a condition arise, you’ll no longer be eligible for certain coverage options. Please keep my information on file should your situation change.


Thanks!

data.name: Flowers Sold Lead - Call#7 EMAIL
data.body: [firstname], I’ve tried messaging you and haven’t heard back. If you’re alright with your current medical this season, let me know. Most of my clients have been glad to switch and save. Let’s see if it makes sense for you.

data.name: Flowers Sold Lead - Call#9 EMAIL
data.body: [firstname], We will be closing your file in the next couple of days. Let me know what changes we should keep. Remember that enrolling too late could mean a huge difference in health coverage. Let’s talk soon. Thanks.

data.name: Fresh - Call 1 - VM/ EM/TX
data.subject: Health Insurance Premiums are out of Control.....
data.body:
Hello [firstname],


Tired of high deductibles?  Premiums too high?  Doctors you want to see aren't in network?  

I can help you, and my help is FREE.  


Health insurance premiums are out of control! The majority of us have experienced outrageous premiums, extremely limited networks and high maximum out-of-pocket costs.


Please reply to this email, or call me directly, at [agentphone] if I can help you.  Again, my help is completely free. 


Thanks,

data.name: Fresh - Call 3 - VM/EM
data.subject: Just left  you a voicemail.....
data.body:
Hi [firstname],


Hopefully you got my previous email, regarding low, or even NO deductible PPO plans, with large National networks.  


Let's get together for 5-10 minutes on the phone to go over your situation and together we can determine what you qualify for.  My help is FREE.


Wishing you good health,

data.name: Fresh - Call 6 - EM
data.subject: Just Checking In....
data.body:
Hello again!


I have been unable to reach you about your health insurance. Just checking to see if you'd like FREE help.  


Have you given up as you found that you are not eligible for a tax credit, which made the Affordable Care Act plans NOT so affordable??


Regardless of your budget or medical history I can help you!


I have experience, personally and professionally, in helping individuals and families find affordable health insurance. If you would like to speak with me directly, please feel free to contact me at [agentphone].



Yours truly,

data.name: Fresh - Call 9 - VM/EM/TX
data.subject: Final Attempt....
data.body:
Hello [firstname],


Final Attempt...


A while back you had inquired online about health insurance.


For awhile now, we have reached out several times to help you with your health insurance needs. I am sorry we have not been able to connect. At this time, we will close down your account.


If your needs change, feel free to contact me at [agentphone] or reply to this email.



Warm regards,

data.name: Group Lead - Call 11 - EM/VM
data.subject: Insurance Follow Up
data.body:
Hello,

I received a health insurance inquiry from you last week.  I did call and leave a message.  In that message, I mentioned starting this process with our census.  Basically, all we need are names, birthdates, and home zip codes. IF you are looking at offering Short/Long term disability and/or Life insurance we would also need their salaries.  If you would like to begin gathering information, I can get you a census, just shoot me a not You may already have this information in another format, feel free to send it over to us.  We can transfer the information over to our census form.  No sense in you doing extra work.

I would also like to set up an initial appointment to chat, so I can get a better understanding of your situation. Let me know a day and time that works best for you.

data.name: Group Lead - Call 14 - VM/EM
data.subject: We can help
data.body:
[firstname],

Partnering with a well-known agent that is a leader in the field could be so positive for your business. I am still trying to touch base with you regarding your health insurance inquiry, please let me know a time that works best to talk and I will call you then. If I don’t hear from you, I will try again at [nextactionstamp].

data.name: Group Lead - Call 4 - EM
data.subject: Your group benefits
data.body:
Hello [firstname],

I understand you’re probably extremely busy this time of the year. I have tried contacting you via phone a few times over the last few days regarding the health insurance inquiry you made. I have a complete understanding on the changing world of health care. Customizing coverage for your business is as essential as health insurance is not a “one size fits all” type of product. Being licensed with multiple carriers I can assure a plan to reflect your culture and budget concerns. With all the different deductible options and product designs, choosing the right plan could be difficult and my mission is to simplify this process. Please give me a call [agentphone] otherwise I will touch base again around [nextactionstamp].

Yours truly,

data.name: Group Lead - Call 7 - EM
data.subject: We need to chat
data.body:
[firstname],

I would like to set up a 20-minute phone conversation to speak with you regarding your group health insurance inquiry. I would like to share the tax incentives for business who offer benefits. Feel free to contact me at any time [agentphone].

data.name: Group Lead â€“ Call 16 â€“ VM/EM
data.body:
Hello,

I have been trying to touch base with you for a little while now regarding your health insurance inquiry but have been unsuccessful in doing so. I have an option for you that is everything you’re looking. Drop me a note as to the best time to call you.

data.name: Group Lead â€“ Call 18 â€“ Final VM/EM
data.subject: Final Attempt
data.body:
Hello [firstname],

This is my final attempt to try and touch base with you to help with your health insurance needs. At this point, I am going to shut down your account due to inactivity. Hopefully, you found exactly what you were looking for. I am always here to help if you need help feel free to call me, [agentfirst], [agentphone] at any time. I wish you the best of luck in your hunt.

Best Regards,

data.name: Interview Confirmation-Cottleville
data.subject: Interview Confirmation
data.body:
Congrats! You've made a  GREAT choice to interview with Healthcare Solutions Team.
Just a few reminders........
 
1-Please arrive 10 minutes prior to your scheduled interview time.
 
2-Please do bring an updated copy of your resume with you.
 
3-We would like you to review both the description attached and video link below. 
 
I have you interviewing with Regional Sales Director Joe Krivelow. Interview Wednesday at 1:15pm located at 5055 State HWY N, Suite 118, Cottleville, MO, 63304.
 
If you're unable to attend your scheduled interview, please do reach out to me ASAP.
I am pulling hiring manager Joe Krivelow to conduct your interview!!!
 
"Doing hard things in one season prepares you to step into the next momentum and purpose" 
Look below for some of the testimonials from our fellow HST Family.
 
I am honored to be a partner representing America's #1 Health Care Insurance Agency ,helping make affordable health care accessible to everyone. Director Kent Stansfield
 
Working for HST allows us to make our own hours, work from home when needed, go on field trips with our children. All while building a "happy" bank account and have less financial stress than when we had with old " traditional jobs". Director "Shane" Saunders. 
 
"This company changed my life." Jordan Krugman
 
HST always has the agent in mind when making decisions on what carries to partner with, products to offer, and strategic business decisions that shape our future. District Partner-Bill Morrissey
 
Career Site------>http://www.myhst.com/careers.asp

data.name: JK Exclusive - Call 11 - Final VM/EM/TX
data.subject: Attention [firstname] - Final Follow up
data.body:
Hello [firstname],

Final Attempt...

A while back you had inquired online about health insurance.

In the last few days, we have reached out several times to help you with your health insurance needs. I am sorry we have not been able to connect. At this time, we will close down your account.

However, if your needs change, feel free to contact me at [agentphone].

 Warm regards,

data.name: JK Exclusive - Call 3 - VM/EM
data.subject: Your recent health insurance inquiry....
data.body:
Hello [firstname],

We have not yet connected but there is a reason for us to connect now.


Health insurance premiums are out of control! The majority of you have experienced outrageous premiums, extremely limited networks and high maximum out-of-pocket costs.

IF you can answer NO to the following questions I have a solution for you with the top national health insurance carriers that are budget friendly, Nationwide PPO Networks and low maximum out-of-pocket costs.

Are you pregnant, an expectant father, in the process of adoption, or undergoing infertility treatment?
Are you a male over 300 pounds or female over 250 pounds?
Have you been hospitalized for mental illness in the last 5 years or have you seen a psychiatrist on more than 5 times during the last 12 months?
Within the last 5 years has any applicant been diagnosed, treated, taken medication for, or experienced signs or symptoms of any of the following:
cancer or tumor
stroke
heart disease including heart attack, chest pain or had heart surgery
COPD (chronic obstructive pulmonary disease) or emphysema
Crohn's disease
liver disorder
degenerative disc disease or herniation/bulge
rheumatoid arthritis
kidney disorder
diabetes
degenerative joint disease of the knee
alcohol abuse or chemical dependency
Acquired Immune Deficiency Syndrome (AIDS) or tested positive for Human Immunodeficiency Virus (HIV)
any neurological disorder
If you answered “yes” to any of these, we do have other options for you. Also, if you own a small business, we’ve had great success finding better coverage than in the individual market.

If I do not hear back from you, I will try to connect with you again around [nextactionstamp].

Thanks,

data.name: JK Exclusive - Call 5 - TX/EM
data.subject: Are you finding rates un-affordable?
data.body:
Hello again!

A bit ago you had inquired online about health insurance and I have been unable to reach you. Just checking to see if you are still interested.

Have you given up as you found that you are not eligible for a tax credit, which made the Affordable Care Act plans NOT so affordable!

 

Regardless of your budget or medical history I can help you!

 

If you would like to speak with me directly, please feel free to contact me at [agentphone].

 

Yours truly,

data.name: JK Exclusive - Call 7 - VM/EM
data.subject: Curious to hear...
data.body:
Hello [firstname],

I would like to discuss your health insurance needs. I tried to reach you by phone but you have not been available. I wanted to know if you are finding what you're looking for?


STOP SHOPPING AROUND!

All rates are the same, they are fixed by law. Nobody can say their rates are better....

 I will try to contact you again regarding your needs at [nextactionstamp].

If this time is not good, please drop me a note back, as to a more convenient time.

 

To your health,

data.name: JK Exclusive - Call 9 - EM
data.subject: Don't miss out!
data.body:
Dear [firstname],

Are you still within the 60 days of your life event? Did you get married, have a baby, move to another state, lose coverage, or some other event that will still qualify you for coverage?

 YOU ONLY HAVE 60 DAYS TO MAKE THAT HAPPEN!

 I would like to help you find affordable health insurance. If you would like to speak with me directly, please feel free to contact me at [agentphone] .

 

To your health,

data.name: JK Exclusive- Call 1 - VM/Auto EM/TX
data.subject: Another health insurance option...
data.body:
[firstname],

Thank you for your recent insurance inquiry. I look forward to speaking with you very soon to discuss your personal needs and budget, answer any questions you may have and assist you in picking the plan that will work best for you or your family.

To send quotes for you to consider I will need to discuss the following information with you:


- Confirm the name, gender, date of birth for each applicant
- Your home zip code
- Tobacco use for any family members? (If yes, who?)
- Prescriptions or current medical conditions for any family members? (If yes, what are the medical conditions, what prescriptions if any, and for whom? Also, is there one that uses more than the rest? ) This information is optional, as there is no medical underwriting, but it will help me to understand your plan utilization and which options will best meet your usage needs.
- What type of plan do you have and what is your current premium? As well as your current maximum medical payments for a year?

Once I have this information I can prepare quotes that will best meet your needs and budget and assist you with the application process.
Feel free to respond in email with this information if you prefer email to a phone conversation.

Thank you!

data.name: LifeX - New Client Email
data.subject: Your New Health Insurance Plan - LifeX
data.body:
Welcome to Your Employee Benefits

This is your personalized Quick Reference Guide for what to expect next and how to access and use your benefits. 


What to Expect Next 

Before Your Benefits Begin:

             One day before your policy start date, you will receive an email from Support@KMG-Services.com with: 

                     * Instructions to activate your Employee Wellness HUB

                     * Your temporary digital ID card 

                     * A downloadable brochure outlining all your benefit resources


Important Paperwork to Complete 

             You will receive an email from admin@lifexresearch.com: 

                     * Instructions to complete your I-9 eletronically

                     * Instructions to complete your w-4 eletronically

                     * These must be completed along with other onboarding task to access your benefits and job functions. 

                    

 

How to Activate Your Employee Wellness HUB)


Instructions: Do not attempt to log in before your policy start date.


How to Log In to the Employee Wellness Hub

  1. 1.  Visit https://employeewellnesshub.app/login
  2. 2.  Enter your LifeX employee email
  3. 3.  Create a unique and secure password, then click “Continue.”
  4. 4.  You’re in! You now have access to your benefits, digital ID card, and more.

    

Compensation for Health Participation 

You will receive an email from SecurityServices_NoReply@adp.com to set up direct deposit through ADP. 

This allows LifeX Research Corp. to compensate you for completing the health questionnaires. 


Provider Search Instructions:

Use this tool to search for in-network doctors and specialists: 


PHCS PPO Provider Search 

1.) Visit https://providersearch.multiplan.com/

2.) Click PHCS Extended PPO and click Select and Search 

3.) Enter your search parameters, your zip code, and select Search 



Cigna PPO Provider Search 

1.) Visit https://hcpdirectory.cigna.com/web/public/consumer/directory/search

2.) Select Find a Doctor 

3.) Select Employer or School 

4.) Enter your zip code. Choose Doctor by Type, Doctor by Name, or Health Facilities. Enter search parameters or choose from the dropdown menu and click Search. 

5.) Select Continue as Guest 

6.) Select Continue. 

7.) Select, PPO, Choice Fund PPO. 

8.) Choose from list of results 


YOU CAN REGISTER YOUR ONLINE ACCOUNT AT WWW. HUMANA.COM AND CHOOSING SIGN IN

THEN "CREATE NEW ACCOUNT' AS A NEW MEMBER. AND SEARCH PROVIDERS THERE OR BELOW:


Humana Dental/VIsion Provider Search 

1.) Visit www.humana.com

2.) Select Find Care in top right

3.) Enter Address, City, County or Zip Code then GET STARTED

4.) Choose Dental or Vision

5.) For Dental use the PPO bubble and choose PPO/Tradional Preferred for the plan 

6.) For Vision chose "through employer" and Next.  

7.) In the Shopping for Plan Column under "Coverage Through An Employer" 

8.) Choose fHumana Vision(Humana Insght Network)



At Your First Doctor's Appointment 

    1. Present your ID card to the front desk, show them your network (PHCS, Cigna). 

    2. Ask the receptionist or insurance coordinator to call 844-580-2474 (Option 2) - listed on the back of your card - for real-time verification of benefits. 

    3. The provider may also visit www.benefithealthplan.com to register their NPI and access claims tools. 


Pharmacy Benefit Manager (PBM) 

Provider: ProAct 

    * Website: www.proactrx.com

    * 24/7 Member Support: 877-635-9545

    * Mail Order Setup: 866-287-9885

You will receive additional mail order and prescription benefit details in your Welcome Email. 


Telehealth Services 

OurLiveDoc: Call: 940-548-3362 for telemedicine access.


Third-Party Administrator (TPA)

Benefit Health Plan, Inc: Responsible for processing claims and paying healthcare providers, and all Pre-Authorization. 

Contact Information: 

    * Phone: 844-580-2474

    * Email: customersupport@benefithealthplan.com

    * Support Hours: Monday through Friday. 8:00AM - 4:00PM CT 

    * Website: www.benefithealthplan.com


Billing Information 

Your monthly premium will be automatically withdrawn by KMG Billing / Benefit Health Plan - this is the name you will see on your bank or credit card statement. 


HSA Details - If you Chose a Health Savings Account 

If your plan includes a HSA (Health Savings Account), it will be set up through Lively, our trusted HSA provider. 

What to Expect: 

    * You'll get an email from Lively 

    * This email will walk you through: 

               1. Setting up your online account 

               2. Downloading the Lively mobile app 

               3. Receiving your HSA debit card in the mail 

               4. Learning how to make contributions and track expenses

[firstname], 

Click the image or view your video from Christina Foley here


Medicare can be so confusing.   All the mail and the phone calls only add to the frustration and confusion.  We are here to help make this process easy for you.  With 10 years of experience, we can help find the right plan for you, whether that is an Advantage plan or a Supplement (Gap) policy.  


In order to find just the right plan, I need just a few minutes of your time to ask you a few questions.   I will take your answers to all the carriers in the area and find a plan right for you.  In order to avoid playing phone tag, here is my calendar:  https://my.timetrade.com/book/5QZLL. Pick the best day and time for you.  


I look forward to talking to you soon.

Don't guess about something so important that can affect the rest of your life.

data.name: Missed Appointment
data.subject: Sorry, we missed you!
data.body:
Hello [firstname], 

We tried to contact you about your health insurance needs, we're sorry we missed you. If there is a day or time that will work better for you, just drop me a note. 

Talk to you soon!

[agentfirst], [agentphone]

data.name: Missed Appointment Call 1 - EM/VM/TX
data.subject: Sorry we missed one another....
data.body:
[firstname],

We had an appointment set regarding your insurance needs, I understand life gets busy and things come up. It happens to me all the time. I will give you a couple hours, around [nextactiontime]. If this time doesn't work for you please drop me a note as to a time that does and we will be in contact. I look forward to speaking with you!

data.name: Missed Appointment Call 11 VM/EM
data.subject: Have you found rates un-affordable?
data.body:
Hello again!


A bit ago you had inquired online about health insurance and I have been unable to reach you. Just checking to see if you are still interested.
Have you given up as you found that you are not eligible for a tax credit, which made the Affordable Care Act plans NOT so affordable!

Please contact me so we can talk about some affordable options for you!

data.name: Missed Appointment Call 15 - VM/EM
data.subject: Did you find what you were looking for?
data.body:
Hello [firstname],
I would like to discuss your health insurance needs. I tried to reach you by phone but you have not been available. I wanted to know if you are finding what you're looking for?
STOP SHOPPING AROUND!
All rates are the same, they are fixed by law. Nobody can say their rates are better....

I have over 10 years of experience, personally and professionally, in helping individuals and families find affordable health insurance. I will try to contact you again regarding your needs at [nextactionstamp].
If this time is not good, please drop me a note back, as to a more convenient time.

data.name: Missed Appointment Call 16 FINAL VM/EM/TX
data.subject: Final Attempt!
data.body:
Hello [firstname],
Final Attempt...
A while back you had inquired online about health insurance.
In the last few days, we have reached out several times to help you with your health insurance needs. I am sorry we have not been able to connect. At this time, we will close down your account.
However, if your needs change, feel free to contact me at [agentphone] or click on the link below to view many different plans.

data.name: Missed Appointment Call 3 - VM/EM
data.subject: When could we reschedule?
data.body:
We were scheduled to chat but it seems we keep missing each other, I'd like to go over your health insurance needs with you as you had requested. Please let me know a time that works best for you, I'd really like to help. If I don't hear from you I will try touching base with you again at [nextactionstamp].
Thanks,

data.name: Missed Appointment Call 6 -EM/VM
data.subject: What can I do to help with your Health Insurance needs?
data.body:
[firstname],

Thank you for your recent insurance inquiry. I look forward to speaking with you very soon to discuss your personal needs and budget, answer any questions you may have and assist you in picking the plan that will work best for you or your family.

To send quotes for you to consider I will need to discuss the following information with you:


- Confirm the name, gender, date of birth for each applicant
- Your home zip code
- Tobacco use for any family members? (If yes, who?)
- Prescriptions or current medical conditions for any family members? (If yes, what are the medical conditions, what prescriptions if any, and for whom? Also, is there one that uses more than the rest? ) This information is optional, as there is no medical underwriting, but it will help me to understand your plan utilization and which options will best meet your usage needs.
- What type of plan do you have and what is your current premium? As well as your current maximum medical payments for a year?

Once I have this information I can prepare quotes that will best meet your needs and budget and assist you with the application process.
Feel free to respond in email with this information if you prefer email to a phone conversation.

data.name: Missed Appointment Call 8 -EM
data.subject: Following up on your recent Health Insurance inquiry...
data.body:
We have not yet connected but there is a reason for us to connect now.

Health insurance premiums are out of control! The majority of you have experienced outrageous premiums, extremely limited networks and high maximum out-of-pocket costs.
IF you can answer NO to the following questions I have a solution for you with the top national health insurance carriers that are budget friendly, Nationwide PPO Networks and low maximum out-of-pocket costs.

  • Are you pregnant, an expectant father, in the process of adoption, or undergoing infertility treatment?
  • Are you a male over 300 pounds or female over 250 pounds?
  • Have you been hospitalized for mental illness in the last 5 years or have you seen a psychiatrist on more than 5 times during the last 12 months?
  • Within the last 5 years has any applicant been diagnosed, treated, taken medication for, or experienced signs or symptoms of any of the following:
    • cancer or tumor
    • stroke
    • heart disease including heart attack, chest pain or had heart surgery
    • COPD (chronic obstructive pulmonary disease) or emphysema
    • Crohn's disease
    • liver disorder
    • degenerative disc disease or herniation/bulge
    • rheumatoid arthritis
    • kidney disorder
    • diabetes
    • degenerative joint disease of the knee
    • alcohol abuse or chemical dependency
    • Acquired Immune Deficiency Syndrome (AIDS) or tested positive for Human Immunodeficiency Virus (HIV)
    • any neurological disorder

If you answered “yes” to any of these, we do have other options for you. Also, if you own a small business, we’ve had great success finding better coverage than in the individual market.
If I do not hear back from you, I will try to connect with you again around [nextactionstamp].
Thanks,

data.name: Not Interested
data.subject: Thank you for your time [firstname]!
data.body:
[firstname],

 

I am sorry that we were unable to help you, but I do appreciate you taking a minute to talk with me. 

Down the road if things should change, please feel free to contact me!

 

Thank you again!

data.name: SOLD - New Client Follow Up - Call #1
data.subject: Checking in as Promised!!
data.body: Do you have your policy materials and cards in hand? Have you had a chance to review your policy packet?  If not, please take a few moments to look it over. If you have any questions or concerns please call me!  Remember,  if you're having any issues or concerns, I should ALWAYS be the first call you make. My job is to make sure this process doesn't give you a headache, so keep me posted.  My contact info is found below.

data.name: SOLD - New Client Follow Up - Call #2
data.subject: How is your insurance working for you?
data.body:
Hello,

Have you used your insurance yet? If not, that is great news! It  means your health is well! Should the time come that you need to use your insurance, fee free to reach out to my office with any questions or concerns. My staff and I are here to help. If you are unable to reach us, please leave a voicemail and one of us will be back in touch soon! 

Wishing you good health!

data.name: SOLD - New Client Follow Up - Call #3
data.subject: Touching Base
data.body:
Hi [firstname],  

I’m sorry we haven’t been able to connect. I just wanted to touch base to make sure your insurance is working smoothly.  As your health insurance broker, I am here to help you get the best possible coverage for you and your family.  Should something in your health or financial situation change, please do not hesitate to contact my office. My staff and I are here to help you in all seasons of life!

Its been a little while since the last time we spoke.  Are you still in need of Health Insurance coverage.  We can look at the options again and find the right plan for you.  If you no longer are in need of coverage please let me know so I can close out your file.  I can be reached at [agentphone] if you would rather speak by phone. Thank you and I look forward to hearing from you.

data.name: Webinar Overview-Thursday
data.subject: Overview Confirmation
data.body:
Congrats! You've made a  GREAT choice to interview with Healthcare Solutions Team.
We are excited about connecting with you on Thursday 9:15AM CST to discover more about this opportunity with Healthcare Solutions Team.  You will be meeting with Regional Sales Director Joe Krivelow.
 
You will need to access the webinar link 5 minutes prior to start time.
Please click the link below to access the interview..........
 
https://healthcaresolutionsteam.webex.com/healthcaresolutionsteam/onstage/g.php?MTID=e8701d98b46374282f43abc08f00493b3
 
****The link provided above does not go live until  5 minutes prior to the interview time. If you click the link too soon it will say the scheduled interview has passed. If you attempt to access a minute late it will not allow you into the webinar****
 
If you were running late or were to have any techinical issues please do contact Joseph Krivelow at 314-440-8958.
